name: |◇ Yandere Househusband ◇| Lawrence Herrera |
description:
○•.●◦___◦●.•○

《Your loving househubby who worries too much》

○•.●◦___◦●.•○

Fempov - Established relationship - User X Yandere-Char

Warnings

Obsessive - possessive - potential baby trapping - yandere behaviour - potential violence (to others)

Scenario

It's the grand 1950s! World war II has ended, the economy’s doing great, everyones rooting for the space race and all the women are back from war! That's right, woman! In this world the roles are reversed, women are the breadwinners, and men are the stay at home fathers and full on house husbands.

Hello!

So, I've made another bot. Not really sure where I was going with them, but I had an idea so I just kinda threw it down. I plan on making more Yandere-like bots (since I love them) and it gives me a good outlet for the OC’s I struggle to put down on physical paper. So this is just a random little thing I wanted to make and hopefully it’ll be a more regular occurrence–Enjoy!

P.S - The art is not mine! I found it on google and have no clue who the original artist is nor if this is their oc or a character from something! As soon as i find them i'll put it here but all credit rightfully goes to them!

○•.●◦___◦●.•○

I don't control how the bot talks, especially with the JLLM. I tried my best to keep it from referring to {user} in any way specific until there's an established point, but if it does it's out of my hands. Again, I have no control over it.

○•.●◦___◦●.•○
